name: GET /api/projects returns active_project_id matching last activated project (B2 context-init contract — PHASE-16 UNIFIED)
description: Validates the backend contract that ProjectProvider.useEffect relies on: after creating and activating a project, GET /api/projects must return active_project_id matching that project's slug — not hardcoded 'default_project'. Without this contract the context init fetch would produce incorrect initial state.
